warps.note: Left door tile — exit to Olivine City
Right door tile — exit to Olivine City

notes: Sailor (NPC) at tile(8,2) facing down — does NOT initiate battle, gives lore dialogue
Pokefan F (NPC) at tile(16,9) walks up/down — gives lighthouse history dialogue
West staircase at tile(3,11) leads to 2F warp 1
East staircase at tiles(16,13) and (17,13) leads to 2F warps 3-4
Both warps at (10,17) and (11,17) exit to Olivine City warp 9
Layout is an open ground floor; no trainers battle on this floor

npcs.name: Sailor
npcs.dialogue_summary: People train at this LIGHTHOUSE. It's not easy to climb because of all the trainers.

npcs.name: Pokefan F
npcs.dialogue_summary: In the past, Pokemon used to light the sea around Olivine at night. The Lighthouse was made in honor of those Pokemon.

notes: Ground floor of the Olivine Lighthouse. No trainers battle here — the two NPCs are non-hostile and provide lore about the lighthouse's history and warning about the trainers on upper floors. Two staircases lead to 2F: one on the west side at (3,11) and a wider one on the east side at (16-17,13). Both door tiles at (10,17) and (11,17) exit to Olivine City. Map uses TILESET_LIGHTHOUSE and MUSIC_LIGHTHOUSE. Map type is DUNGEON in pokecrystal's internal enum.
